'''Zu Pike''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Epicanthix]] and the twin sister of [[Zan Pike]]. The only way to tell them apart was the fact that Zan had green eyes and Zu had a green eye and a blue eye.

==Biography==
[[File:Zupike.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Zu Pike]]

The Pike sisters were born in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]], the daughters of famous [[Teräs Käsi/Legends|Teräs Käsi]] fighter [[Dux Pike]]. He died when they were infants, just before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Dux Pike's wife|Their mother]] was a [[Noble/Legends|noblewoman]] of [[Bunduki/Legends|Bunduki]]. She placed the twins, as children, in the hands of [[Followers of Palawa]] for their education.

Zan and Zu went on to become Teräs Käsi masters themselves, and criminals for the highest bidder. They competed in illegal fighting matches across the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] had them hired to work for [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. Following his death, they signed on to work with [[Spinda Caveel]], who sent them to acquire [[A-OIC]] and, later, to re-acquire him and the [[Human replica droid]] [[Guri]]. On this latter expedition, they encountered the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]], and decided to cut their losses, quitting their employment with Caveel. When he drew his blaster to keep them on task, they killed him.

Zu flew the ''[[Steel Hand]]'', a two-person starfighter, with her sister as a passenger.
